title: crataegus integra
intro: Crataegus integra, also known as the Chinese hawthorn or Mayday tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular effects. The health benefits of Crataegus integra include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve lipid profiles, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Crataegus integra include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
